headline: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Forms OKX Venture And Launches GreenTrace Carbon Registry
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) has set up a 50-50 joint venture with OKX to build infrastructure for tokenized and digitally native financial products. The venture, co-chaired by former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, is expected to give clients access to tokenized versions of ICE futures and NYSE-listed equities. ICE also launched ICE GreenTrace, an environmental registry platform that supports the full lifecycle of carbon credits and migration of existing registries to ICE...
